detail_en: Give your name. Do not argue, run, or say anything else about the day. Staying calm keeps you safer.

title_en: Ask what you are being arrested for.
detail_en: You are entitled to be told the grounds. Ask clearly and remember what they say.

title_en: Ask to make a call. Call legal aid first.
detail_en: Someone must be informed of your arrest. Call a legal aid number before anyone else — they can act fastest.

title_en: Ask to speak to a lawyer.
detail_en: You have the right to meet a lawyer of your choice. If you cannot afford one, free legal aid is your right.
Read anything before signing. You are not required to sign a statement you disagree with or have not read.

title_en: If you are hurt, say so and ask for a doctor.
detail_en: You can ask to be examined by a medical practitioner. Say out loud if you are injured.

title_en: Note the officer's name and number.
detail_en: Officers must wear visible identification. Remember or write down the name and badge number.
